metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters pMun, pUFs

lnRtC = 9999999

lcQuery = [Select a.Codigos ] + ;
		    [From SigCdMun a, SigCdUfs b ] + ;
		   [Where a.Descs = '] + Padr(fLimpaTexto(Upper(pMun)), 40) + [' And ] + ;
		   		 [a.UFIBGEs = b.UFIBGEs And ] + ;
		   		 [b.Estados = '] + pUFs + [']

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, [LocalMunic]) < 1)
	=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conexão (LocalMunic)])
	Return 0
EndIf

Select LocalMunic
Go Top In LocalMunic
If Not Eof([LocalMunic]... [TRUNCADO]

Local llRetorno

m.llRetorno = .T.

* Consiste o campo operação
lcCdEstoque = ThisForm.getCdEstoque.Value
If !IsEmpty(lcCdEstoque) And !(ThisForm.poDataMgr.ChkRegister('SigCdCli','iclis',lcCdEstoque))
   ThisForm.pcMsg = 'Conta inválida.'
   ThisForm.getCdEstoque.SetFocus
   m.llRetorno = .F.
   EndIf
   
* Consiste o campo data inicial
If IsEmpty(ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.Value)
	ThisForm.pcMsg = 'Data inicial inválida !'
	ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.SetFocus
	m.llRetorno = .F.
EndIf

lnVal = ThisForm.container1.chkValor.Value

If ThisForm.Comparativo.Value = 1
	*** mena 05/04/2016 - aumentada a mascara de 999 para 9999 na coluna Qtd deste report ***
	Report Form SigReCm2 Preview NoConsole
ELSE
	*** mena 08/06/2016 - incluido relatorio com informacoes de cliente - BNF
	If ThisForm.container1.chkDadosCli.Value = 1

ENDIF

ThisForm.get_nm_operacao.SetFocus

metodos.codigoOriginal:
PRIVATE lnVal

lnVal = ThisForm.container1.chkValor.Value

If ThisForm.Comparativo.Value = 1
	*** mena 05/04/2016 - aumentada a mascara de 999 para 9999 na coluna Qtd deste report ***
	Report Form SigReCm2 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
ELSE
	*** mena 08/06/2016 - incluido relatorio com informacoes de cliente - BNF
	If ThisForm.container1.chkDadosCli.Value = 1
		Report Form SigReCm3 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	ELSE
		Report Form SigReCm1 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	ENDIF
ENDIF

ThisForm.get_nm_op... [TRUNCADO]

If ThisForm.Comparativo.Value = 0
	Report Form SigReCm1 To Printer
Else
	Report Form SigReCm2 To Printer
EndIf	
ThisForm.get_nm_operacao.SetFocus

Select CrSigCdTom
Replace All CrSigCdTom.nMarca with 0
Go Top
ThisForm.Refresh

If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	= fAcessoMovmto(Usuar,This.Value,This)
    ThisForm.Apaga.Click()
	ThisForm.GrdTipo.Enabled = .F.
	ThisForm.Apaga.Enabled   = .F.
	ThisForm.SelTudo.Enabled = .F.	
Else
  	ThisForm.GrdTipo.Enabled = .T.
    ThisForm.Apaga.Enabled   = .T.
	ThisForm.SelTudo.Enabled = .T.	
EndIf
Return(IsEmpty(ThisForm.getCdVendedor.Value))

Grupo = ''
If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,Grupo,'D',This.Value,ThisForm.getcdvendedor,ThisForm.getdsvendedor)
		Messagebox('Acesso Negado !!',0+48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.getcdvendedor.Value = ''
		ThisForm.getcdvendedor.Refresh
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getcdvendedor.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getcdvendedor.Refresh
	Return(.T.)
EndIf

If (This.Value = 3)
	ThisForm.opt_MovCad.Value = 2
	ThisForm.chkCidade.Value = 0
EndIf
Return(IsEmpty(ThisForm.getCdEstoque.Value))

Grupo = ''

	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,Grupo,'D',This.Value,ThisForm.getcdestoque,ThisForm.getdsestoque)
		Messagebox('Acesso Negado !!',0+48,'')

		This.Refresh

Else
	ThisForm.getcdestoque.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getcdestoque.Refresh

EndIf

Grupo = ''

		Messagebox('Acesso Negado !!',0+48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.getdsestoque.Value = ''
		ThisForm.getdsestoque.Refresh
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getdsestoque.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getdsestoque.Refresh
	Return(.T.)
EndIf

ThisForm.pcMsg = ''
If ThisForm.mChkValid()
	ThisForm.Processamento()
	If !Eof()
		ThisForm.Enabled = .F.
		Do Form SigReCmg With ThisForm
	Else
		ThisForm.pcMsg = 'Nenhum Registro Encontrado.'
	EndIf
EndIf
If !IsEmpty(ThisForm.pcMsg)
	ThisForm.LockScreen = .F.
	MessageBox(ThisForm.pcMsg,(0+48+0),'')
EndIf

dDti = this.Value
dDtf = thisform.get_dt_final.Value

If (Year(dDtf) - Year(dDti)) >= 6
	MessageBox([O periodo não pode passar de 6 anos!!],0+64,[Atenção!!])
	
	thisform.BtnReport.visualiza.Enabled = .F.
	thisform.BtnReport.imprime.Enabled = .F.
	thisform.BtnReport.docExcel.Enabled = .F.	
	
	Return .f.
Else
	thisform.BtnReport.visualiza.Enabled = .T.
	thisform.BtnReport.imprime.Enabled = .T.
	thisform.BtnReport.docExcel.Enabled = .T.	
EndIf

Grupo = ''
If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,Grupo,'C',This.Value,ThisForm.getcdvendedor,ThisForm.getdsvendedor)
		Messagebox('Acesso Negado !!',0+48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.getdsvendedor.Value = ''
		ThisForm.getdsvendedor.Refresh
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getdsvendedor.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getdsvendedor.Refresh

EndIf

Local lCod,lFan,xObj

If IsEmpty(This.Value)
	ThisForm.get_moeda_desc.Value = ''

EndIf

EndIf

If LastKey() <> 27 And Used('CrProds')
	ThisForm.get_cd_codigo.... [TRUNCADO]

	ThisForm.get_ds_codigo.Refresh
	Return(.T.)
EndIf

If This.Value = 1 And ThisForm.Opt_SelRel.Value = 1

	ThisForm.cmdGgrafico1.cmdGrafico1.Enabled = .T.
Else
	ThisForm.Opt_Compara.Enabled              = .F.
	ThisForm.cmdGgrafico1.Enabled             = .F.
	ThisForm.cmdGgrafico1.cmdGrafico1.Enabled = .F.
EndIf

ThisForm.container1.chkvalor.Value = 0
